name: Get On Top Touch
description: Be ready for playing a wonderful multiplayer and extremely contentious game. At this game you will see the battle of getting on top of two interconnected characters. You will direct a hero and your friend will direct another hero. You can succeed in getting on top by moving your character wisely. But if you play randomly, you will lose. You can play on your computer or mobile devices.
instructions: Player s Controls First Player Jump W Left A Right D Second Player Jump Upper Arrow Key Left
tags: 1 Player, 2 Player, 2 Player Games, Arcade, Classic
